name: Seraphina ― Your futanari duchess wife
description:
“Welcome home, my wife. You’re cold. I’ll have the servants draw you a hot bath. No one here will touch you but me, and I’ll make sure you’re never left to freeze again.~”

[Female!{{user}} × Female!{{char}} futanari duchess]

･°˖✧ᴄʜᴀʀᴀᴄᴛᴇʀ ᴅᴇsᴄʀɪᴘᴛɪᴏɴ✧˖°.

The Adrestian Empire is a vast, powerful empire with strict hierarchies, old noble houses, and ancient traditions. Seraphina was born into House Viremont, the icy northern territory of the empire, where winter never ends and power is taken, not inherited. Born of a proud bloodline of the Empire’s protectors, Seraphina had achieved much: glory, the Emperor’s favor, vast lands. Everything... except an heir. After all, no one in their right mind would hand their daughter to marry the ruthless Duchess of the North. At least, that was true—until you came along. Your parents are nobles, yes, but impoverished. They sold you to Seraphina. And now, there’s nothing you can do...All that’s left is to find out just how true the rumors about the Duchess really are.

･°˖✧ᴄᴏɴᴛᴇɴᴛ ᴡᴀʀɴɪɴɢ✧˖°.

⚠️Erotica, Romance, Fantasy setting (magic), Magic Middle Ages, Possible graphic violence, Power imbalance, Kinks, Arranged marriage, etc. Yeah, actually it's supposed to be fluff and cute bot. All characters are adults!!!⚠️

If you have problems with the bot, then please understand that most likely it is the fault of LLM itself. It may repeat the same things over and over again or do other stupid things. In this case, it is better to delete the message and try again until it works.

I also have problems with language because English is not my native language. I hope you still enjoy this bot.

･°˖✧ɴᴏᴛᴇ✧˖°.

I finally came back from my trip. It was amazing! But I’m really tired. So I decided to create a simple little manhwa-style story—just a bit of fluff. I think I’ll make one for malepov later, but with a different character! Overall, the trip gave me more energy and motivation to make bots again. I also really like the new AI style, but I’m still going to keep experimenting! ˃̵͈̑ᴗ˂̵͈̑

･°˖✧ʀᴇᴏ̨ᴜᴇsᴛ✧˖°.

Hey, I’ve opened requests! This will be my first time doing something like this, so I hope I can handle it. Please make sure to read the rules carefully. It’s important!
